indicators.name: absence of cooking appliances
indicators.rationale: No stove, oven, or microwave is visible, making it impossible to cook in this space.

indicators.name: absence of water fixture
indicators.rationale: No sink is present, which is essential for food preparation and kitchen hygiene.

indicators.name: soft seating furniture
indicators.rationale: A large bed takes up the majority of the floor space, leaving no usable cooking workspace.

indicators.name: absence of hard prep surfaces
indicators.rationale: No countertop or hard washable work surface is present, which is required for all food preparation tasks.

indicators.name: wall art and decorative items
indicators.rationale: These items do not contribute to the functionality of the space for cooking.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for daily cooking. There are no cooking appliances, no sink, and no hard prep surfaces. The space is dominated by soft seating furniture, making it impossible to use for cooking. The presence of wall art and decorative items further undermines the suitability for cooking.
